basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Jr. Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 29-07-2026.

age_limit.details: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification. Age relaxation for SC/ST: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted. For Retired/Superannuated Government Employee: Salary fixed as per prevailing IRD norms.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st class M.Tech./M.S. (or equivalent) in Structural Engineering or a related discipline.
qualification.details: Jr. Research Fellow: 1st class M.Tech./M.S. (or equivalent) in Structural Engineering or a related discipline. Candidates with experience in structural design, steel structures, and experimental testing will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF/SRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Jr. Research Fellow: 1st class M.Tech./M.S. (or equivalent) in Structural Engineering or a related discipline. Candidates with experience in structural design, steel structures, and experimental testing will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF/SRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification. Age relaxation for SC/ST: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted. For Retired/Superannuated Government Employee: Salary fixed as per prevailing IRD norms.

rows.event: Last date for submitting applications by email

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi is 29th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st class M.Tech./M.S. (or equivalent) in Structural Engineering or a related discipline to be eligible for the Jr. Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this role?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, candidates with experience in structural design, steel structures, and experimental testing will be preferred for the Jr. Research Fellow role.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to download the application form, fill it out completely, and send it to the specified email address with the advertisement number in the subject line.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for the Jr. Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Jr. Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Jr. Research Fellow position will involve an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from CFTIs with a good CGPA apply even if they haven't cleared NET/GATE?
faq.answer: Yes, the NET/GATE requirement may be relaxed for candidates from CFTIs who have a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/177/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: You can download the application form (Form No. IRD/REC-4) from the IRD Website: http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.
